Interface IMemoryBlobStream2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members that control the Blob Stream.

[Guid("5CE09F2C-9C93-4A3B-83AD-E12FB6A67AD4")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IMemoryBlobStream2 : IMemoryBlobStream, IBlobStream, IStream, ISequentialStream

The allocated size of the stream.

uint AllocSize { get; set; }

uint
